raw_responses.title: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents Survey (2603.07670)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: comprehensive survey of agent memory mechanisms; Pattern C tiered memory with learned control (context, structured DB, vector store, cold archive); MemGPT-style tier promotion/demotion.

raw_responses.title: MemoryAgentBench ICLR 2026 Multi-Turn Memory Eval
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: evaluating memory in LLM agents via incremental multi-turn interactions; benchmark of tiered memory architectures.

raw_responses.title: A-Mem Agentic Memory LLM Agents (2502.12110)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Agentic Memory trains store/retrieve/update/summarize/discard as callable tools via 3-stage RL pipeline with step-wise GRPO.

raw_responses.title: HMT Hierarchical Memory Transformer (NAACL 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: hierarchical memory imitating human memorization; segment-level recurrence preserving early tokens; memory embeddings passed along sequence.

raw_responses.title: H-MEM Hierarchical Memory High-Efficiency Long (EACL 2026)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: hierarchical memory with position index searched layer-by-layer; removes influence of irrelevant memories.

raw_responses.title: MemPalace Spatial Metaphor LLM Memory (2604.21284)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: method-of-loci memory-palace spatial metaphor for LLM long-term memory; spatial-landmark anchoring.

raw_responses.title: HashEvict LSH KV Cache Eviction (2412.16187)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: locality-sensitive hashing for dynamic pre-attention token eviction; 30-70% compression.

raw_responses.title: DeepSeek Engram Conditional Memory Scalable Lookup (2601.07372)
